intro.p1: PayMint LLC is a technology solutions company specializing in Point of Sale (POS) systems and digital business management platforms. Our products are designed to simplify daily operations—from fast, reliable sales processing on digital devices to automated management tools that give businesses full operational visibility.
intro.p2: At the core of PayMint is one clear goal: to give business owners accurate, real-time access to their data while enabling faster, smoother checkout experiences for their customers.
intro.p3: The PayMint app is available on both iOS and Android and can be downloaded for free. Businesses can create a PayMint account and complete setup directly through the POS app or via the online management dashboard.
intro.p4: PayMint also supports multi-branch operations. Owners and account managers can add, merge, or separate establishments as needed, all from a single universal dashboard. This allows centralized control over sales, staff, products, and performance across multiple locations, with discounted pricing for additional branches.

story.description: Paymint was founded with a mission to simplify business operations for merchants everywhere.
story.p1: PayMint LLC is a Jordanian company operating globally. The platform officially launched in 2025, built on insights gathered from years of research into the POS and retail technology space.
story.p2: Development spanned more than three years, with a strong focus on security, performance, and scalability. Every feature was designed to meet real-world business needs and compete confidently with leading global POS solutions. Today, PayMint stands as a modern, secure, and scalable system built to support businesses of all sizes—anywhere in the world.
story.title: Our Story

v1.description: PayMint offers one of the most competitive POS solutions in the market when considering the full range of included services. Our pricing is transparent, with no hidden fees or unexpected costs—just a complete, all-in-one system at an accessible monthly rate.
v1.title: Affordable. Transparent. Complete.

v2.description: We developed PayMint in close collaboration with business owners and frontline staff. The result is an intuitive system that can be learned in minutes, not days. Guided in-app tours and clear workflows ensure users always know what to do and how to do it.
v2.title: Built for Simplicity

v3.description: Speed, reliability, and usability are central to everything we build. PayMint is engineered for fast transactions and smooth daily operations. Our UI and workflows are designed using behavioral insights and user interaction analysis, ensuring that critical actions are easy to access and setup is quick and effortless.
v3.title: Performance-Driven Design

content.control_1: Most web browsers are set to accept cookies by default. You can usually modify your browser settings to decline cookies if you prefer.

content.questionsDesc: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at support@paymint.app
content.thirdParty_1: We may use third-party cookies from services like Google Analytics and Facebook to help us analyze traffic and improve our services.
content.updates_1: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for operational, legal, or regulatory reasons.
content.updates_2: We will notify you of any material changes by posting the updated policy on this page with a new effective date.
content.whatAre_1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to site owners.
content.whatAre_2: Cookies can be "persistent" (remaining on your device until deleted) or "session" cookies (deleted when you close your browser).
content.whyUse_1: We use cookies to ensure the proper functioning of our website, remember your preferences, analyze site usage, and personalize your experience.

international.desc: Your information may be transferred to and maintained on servers located outside of your country. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for international data transfers.

privacy.intro: PayMint LLC ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our services.

retention.deletionRequest: You may request deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us or using the account deletion feature in your settings.
retention.r1: Account data: Retained for the duration of your account plus 30 days after deletion request
retention.r2: Transaction records: Retained for 7 years as required by financial regulations
retention.r3: Analytics data: Retained in anonymized form indefinitely

rights.contact: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@paymint.app
rights.ri1: Right to access your personal data and request a copy
rights.ri2: Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete personal data
rights.ri3: Right to request deletion of your personal data
rights.ri4: Right to restrict or object to processing of your data

sections.s1_1_desc: We collect information you provide directly, such as when you create an account, make a purchase, or contact us for support.
sections.s1_2_desc: We automatically collect certain information about your device and usage patterns when you interact with our services.
sections.s1_2_note: We never sell your personal information to third parties.
sections.s1_3_desc: We may receive information about you from third-party services you connect to your Paymint account.
sections.s1_4_desc: We collect transaction data processed through our point-of-sale system to provide our services.
sections.s1_desc: We collect several types of information to provide and improve our services.
sections.s2_desc: We use the information we collect to operate, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, and communicate with you.
sections.s3_desc: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your data with service providers who assist us in operating our platform, subject to confidentiality obligations.
sections.s4_desc: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, access controls, and regular security audits to protect your information.
sections.s5_desc: We retain your information only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law.
sections.s6_desc: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information, including the right to access, correct, or delete your data.
sections.s7_desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the updated policy on our website.
sections.s8_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@paymint.app
sections.subtitle: How we protect your data
sections.title: Privacy Policy

security.noAbsoluteSecurity: While we strive to protect your personal information, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.
security.sec1: AES-256 encryption for all data at rest
security.sec2: TLS 1.3 encryption for all data in transit
security.sec3: PCI DSS Level 1 compliance for payment data
security.sec4: Regular third-party security audits and penetration testing

sharing.obligation: We may disclose your information if required to do so by law or in response to valid legal processes.
sharing.sh1: Service providers who help us operate our platform (hosting, analytics, payment processing)
sharing.sh2: Business partners with your consent for integrated services
sharing.sh3: Law enforcement or regulatory bodies when required by applicable law

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

usage.noSell: We never sell your personal information to third parties.
usage.u1: Process and complete transactions you request
usage.u2: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
usage.u3: Send you technical notices, updates, and support messages
usage.u4: Respond to your comments, questions, and customer service requests
usage.u5: Monitor and analyze trends, usage, and activities
usage.u6: Detect, investigate, and prevent fraudulent transactions and abuse
usage.u8: Comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms

availability.desc: We strive to maintain high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted service. We may perform scheduled maintenance with advance notice.

contact.desc: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal@paymint.app

terms.intro: Welcome to Paymint. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

ip.desc: All content, trademarks, and intellectual property on our platform are owned by PayMint LLC or its licensors. You may not copy, modify, or distribute our content without written permission.

law.desc: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which PayMint LLC is registered.

liability.desc: To the maximum extent permitted by law, PayMint LLC shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services.

payments.p1: You agree to pay all fees associated with your subscription plan. Fees are non-refundable except as required by law.
payments.p2: We may change our pricing with 30 days' notice. Continued use after the change constitutes acceptance of the new pricing.

privacy.p1: Your use of our services is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference.
privacy.p2: By using our services, you consent to the collection and use of data as described in our Privacy Policy.

responsibilities.accuracy: You are responsible for maintaining the accuracy of your account information.

responsibilities.r1: Maintain the confidentiality of your login credentials

termination.desc: We may suspend or terminate your access to our services at any time for violation of these terms. You may cancel your account at any time through your account settings.

use.u1: Paymint grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use our services for your business operations.

cashGap.understandingDesc: Variance is calculated as: (Closing Balance - Opening Balance) - Total Sales. Positive values indicate cash over, negative values indicate cash short. Regular small variances are normal, but large or frequent discrepancies may indicate training needs.

ft1.li1_desc: Process sales quickly with an intuitive, touch-optimized interface designed for speed.
ft1.li10: Track employee hours and shift performance
ft1.li11: Monitor sales per staff member for performance reviews

ft1.p1: Paymint is a complete 360° point-of-sale solution built for modern businesses. This guide covers all the features available to you.
ft1.p2: The POS system is designed to be fast, reliable, and easy for your staff to learn.
ft1.p3: Keep track of every item in your inventory with real-time updates.
ft1.p4: Manage your team with flexible roles and detailed performance tracking.
ft1.p5: Make data-driven decisions with comprehensive analytics and reporting.
ft1.p6: Build lasting customer relationships with our built-in CRM and loyalty system.
ft1.type1_desc: Your main sales interface — process orders, apply discounts, and complete transactions.
ft1.type2_desc: Track raw materials, ingredients, and finished products across all locations.
ft1.type3_desc: Assign roles, manage schedules, and track employee performance.
ft1.type4_desc: Real-time dashboards, sales reports, and business analytics.
ft1.type5_desc: Customer database with loyalty points, purchase history, and engagement tools.
ft1.type6_desc: Configure your store settings, tax rates, receipt layout, and more.

gs1.p1: Welcome to Paymint! This guide will walk you through everything you need to get your business up and running.
gs1.p2: Start by creating your account and verifying your email address.
gs1.p3: Next, set up your first business location with all the essential details.
gs1.p4: Add your products, set prices, and organize them into categories.
gs1.p5: Set up the payment methods you want to accept — cash, cards, and digital wallets.
gs1.p6: Invite your team members and assign them appropriate roles and permissions.
gs1.p7: Once everything is set up, download the POS app and start processing orders!

gs2.p4: Manage all your orders from a single, unified view.
gs2.p5: Build and manage your team with flexible roles and permissions.
gs2.p6: Configure every aspect of your business from the settings panel.

tc1.a1_1: First, check your internet connection. Try loading another website to verify. If the internet is working, try refreshing the page or clearing your browser cache.
tc1.a1_2: If the problem persists, try using a different browser or device. You can also check our status page for any known outages.
tc1.a1_3: If none of these steps work, contact our support team with details about the error you're seeing.
tc1.a2_1: Ensure your printer is powered on and connected to the same network as your POS device. Check that the correct printer is selected in Settings > Receipts.
tc1.a2_2: Try printing a test page from the printer settings. If that works but POS printing doesn't, reinstall the printer driver.
tc1.a3_1: Paymint automatically syncs data when your connection is restored. You can continue processing orders in offline mode.
tc1.a3_2: Once back online, go to Settings > Sync to manually trigger a sync if needed.
tc1.a3_3: All offline transactions are securely stored on your device and will be uploaded when connectivity returns.
tc1.li1: Check your internet connection and Wi-Fi signal strength
tc1.li2: Clear your browser cache and cookies
tc1.li3: Try using a different browser (Chrome recommended)
tc1.li4: Restart your device and try again
tc1.li5: Ensure your firewall isn't blocking Paymint
tc1.li6: Update your browser to the latest version
tc1.li7: Contact support if issues persist after trying all steps
tc1.p1: This guide helps you troubleshoot the most common technical issues you may encounter with Paymint.
tc1.p2: Most issues can be resolved with these simple steps. If you need further assistance, our support team is available 24/7.
tc1.p3: Follow this diagnostic process to identify and resolve technical issues.
tc1.q1: Why can't I access the Paymint dashboard?
tc1.q2: My receipt printer isn't working. What should I do?
tc1.q3: What happens to my data during an internet outage?
tc1.step1_desc: Ensure your device is connected to the internet and the connection is stable.
tc1.step2_desc: Close and reopen the Paymint app or refresh your browser.
tc1.step3_desc: Remove temporary files that might cause issues.
tc1.step4_desc: Make sure you're running the latest version of Paymint.
tc1.step5_desc: If the issue persists, reach out to our support team with error details.

popularArticles.account: How to manage your account settings

qa.empty_subtitle: Try adjusting your search or category filter.
qa.needMoreHelp: Need more help? Contact our support team.

q1.answer: Paymint is a comprehensive digital payment solution designed to help businesses of all sizes accept payments, manage finances, and grow. We offer a suite of tools including a payment gateway, point-of-sale systems, and detailed analytics.
q1.question: What is Paymint?

q2.answer: Paymint is currently available in over 30 countries across North America, Europe, and Asia. We are rapidly expanding to new regions. Please check our supported countries list on our pricing page for the most up-to-date information.
q2.question: Is Paymint available in my country?

q3.answer: With Paymint, you can accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), digital wallets (Apple Pay, Google Pay), and local payment methods specific to your region.
q3.question: What payment methods can I accept?

q4.answer: Standard payouts are processed daily and typically arrive in your bank account within 2 business days. We also offer an Instant Payout feature for eligible merchants, allowing you to access your funds in minutes for a small fee.
q4.question: How long do payouts take?

q5.answer: Yes, security is our top priority. We are PCI DSS Level 1 compliant, which is the highest standard of payment security. All data is encrypted using advanced encryption standards (AES-256), and we employ 24/7 fraud monitoring.
q5.question: Is Paymint secure?

q6.answer: You can reset your password by clicking on the "Forgot Password" link on the login page. Follow the instructions sent to your registered email address to create a new password. If you are logged in, you can change it from your Account Settings.
q6.question: How do I reset my password?

q7.answer: Yes! Our Team Management feature allows you to add multiple users with different roles and permissions (e.g., Admin, Manager, Cashier). You can manage these settings from the "Team" section in your dashboard.
q7.question: Can I add multiple users to my account?

q8.answer: No, we believe in complete transparency. Our pricing model is simple: a small percentage per transaction plus a fixed fee. There are no setup fees, monthly fees, or hidden charges for our standard plan.
q8.question: Are there any hidden fees?

qa.subtitle: Find answers quickly
qa.title: How can we help you?

mock.desc1: I'm having trouble connecting my receipt printer to the POS system. It was working fine yesterday but now shows as offline.
mock.reply1: Thank you for reaching out! Let me help you with the printer connection issue.
mock.reply2: Please try restarting both the printer and your POS device, then check the Wi-Fi connection.
mock.reply3: If the issue persists, please share your printer model and I'll provide specific troubleshooting steps.
